resumo: Talking about daily routine helps students describe habits and activities in English.
Time expressions organize when actions happen during the day.
This topic supports practical communication in familiar situations.

explicacao.texto: Students learn verbs and expressions related to everyday habits, such as wake up, study, eat, go to school and sleep. This vocabulary helps describe daily life clearly and simply.
explicacao.dica: Connect the expressions to your own routine to make learning more meaningful.

explicacao.texto: Time expressions such as in the morning, at night, at seven o'clock and every day help organize information in sentences. They make communication more precise and complete.
explicacao.dica: Practice saying what you do and when you do it.

exemplos.enunciado: Read: 'I wake up at six and go to school in the morning.'
passos: Identify the routine actions in the sentence.
Observe the time expressions that organize the information.
exemplos.resposta: This is a simple example of daily routine description in English.

exercicios.enunciado: Talking about daily routine helps students:
alternativas: describe habits and activities
avoid using verbs
replace language with drawings only
ignore time in communication
exercicios.explicacao: Routine vocabulary helps students talk about everyday actions in English.

exercicios.enunciado: Time expressions are important because they:
alternativas: show when actions happen
replace all nouns in a sentence
eliminate the need for verbs
serve only for mathematical operations
exercicios.explicacao: Time expressions help organize actions in relation to moments of the day or week.

alternativas: Daily routine and time expressions help build practical communication in English.
This topic has no connection with real life.
Students cannot describe habits with simple sentences.
Time expressions are useless in communication.
exercicios.respostaCorreta: Daily routine and time expressions help build practical communication in English.
exercicios.explicacao: This content helps students talk about daily life in clear and useful ways.

exercicios.enunciado: Studying this topic helps the student:
alternativas: talk about daily habits more clearly
avoid all communication about time
use isolated words without context
replace verbs with random expressions
exercicios.respostaCorreta: talk about daily habits more clearly
exercicios.explicacao: The topic expands vocabulary and sentence building for everyday communication.
